securityGroups.title: Security Groups
securityGroups.description: Bundle users into groups to grant permissions in bulk.
securityGroups.noGroups: No security groups yet. Create one to get started.
securityGroups.noMembers: No members yet. Add users from this organization.
securityGroups.confirmDelete: Delete this group? This will revoke any permissions granted via this group.

clientSharing.title: Sharing
clientSharing.noParticipants: Only the primary organization has access. Add participating orgs to share this client.
clientSharing.canSeeOtherEntries: Can see time entries from other organizations
clientSharing.confirmRemove: Remove this organization's access? Their historical time entries will remain but they'll lose access to this client.
clientSharing.noPermissions: No explicit permissions granted. Members have baseline access based on their org.

orgRelationships.title: Organization Relationships
orgRelationships.pendingChild: Waiting for the other org to accept
orgRelationships.pendingParent: Invitation to join as a child organization

changePrimary.title: Change Primary Organization
changePrimary.warning: This transfers ownership of the client to the target organization. You must be an owner of the current primary org and a member of the target.
changePrimary.consequence: The current primary organization will automatically become a participating organization so their time entries continue to work.
